summary: Comprehensive testing of VPN, Zero Trust, Browser Isolation, and Agent Commands features. All 28 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI verified with all pages loading correctly and key functionality working.
passed_tests: Authentication - Login with test credentials
VPN - GET /api/vpn/status returns server status
VPN - POST /api/vpn/initialize works
VPN - GET /api/vpn/peers lists all peers
VPN - POST /api/vpn/peers adds new peer
VPN - GET /api/vpn/peers/{id}/config downloads WireGuard config file
VPN - Invalid peer ID returns 404
Zero Trust - GET /api/zero-trust/stats returns statistics
Zero Trust - GET /api/zero-trust/devices lists devices
Zero Trust - POST /api/zero-trust/devices registers new device
Zero Trust - POST /api/zero-trust/devices/{id}/block blocks device and creates remediation command
Zero Trust - POST /api/zero-trust/devices/{id}/unblock unblocks device
Zero Trust - GET /api/zero-trust/policies lists access policies
Zero Trust - GET /api/zero-trust/access-logs returns logs
Browser Isolation - GET /api/browser-isolation/stats returns statistics
Browser Isolation - GET /api/browser-isolation/modes lists isolation modes
Browser Isolation - POST /api/browser-isolation/analyze-url analyzes URL
Browser Isolation - POST /api/browser-isolation/analyze-url detects suspicious patterns
Browser Isolation - POST /api/browser-isolation/sessions creates isolated session
Browser Isolation - GET /api/browser-isolation/sessions lists active sessions
Browser Isolation - GET /api/browser-isolation/blocked-domains lists blocked domains
Agent Commands - GET /api/agent-commands/types lists command types
Agent Commands - GET /api/agent-commands/agents/status lists registered agents
Agent Commands - GET /api/agent-commands/agents/connected lists connected agents
Agent Commands - GET /api/agent-commands/pending lists pending commands
Agent Commands - GET /api/agent-commands/history returns command history
Agent Commands - POST /api/agent-commands/create creates new command
Zero Trust to Agent Commands Integration - Block device creates remediation command

features: Initialize Server button visible and clickable
Server Status displayed (Not Installed - WireGuard not on server)
Download config buttons for each peer
URL analysis shows threat level and patterns
Active sessions list with Open/End Session buttons
Sessions, Browser View, Blocklist, Modes tabs
Zero Trust triggered remediation commands visible
Agents, Pending, Send Command, History tabs

critical_code_review_comments: VPN server shows 'Not Installed' because WireGuard is not installed on the server - this is expected and documented
VPN config download returns valid WireGuard configuration with proper [Interface] and [Peer] sections
Zero Trust to Agent Commands integration working - blocking a device creates remediation commands
Browser Isolation URL analysis correctly detects suspicious patterns like .exe files
seed_data_creation: Created test devices and peers during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All requested features tested and working. VPN page has Initialize Server button, peer list with download config. Zero Trust has block/unblock with remediation command creation. Browser Isolation has URL analysis and session creation. Agent Commands shows pending commands including Zero Trust triggered ones. WireGuard not installed on server so VPN start/stop will fail (expected - documented as MOCKED).

mocked_integrations.note: WireGuard is not installed on the server, so VPN start/stop operations will fail. Container Security uses seeded data (Docker not available). These are expected limitations documented in the review request.
mocked_apis: VPN server start/stop requires WireGuard installation
